title: SSH into Amazon EC2 Instance
author: Mihai IONITA
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.xjcfkiw

steps.title: Select Instances , Actions, Instance State,...
steps.instruction: Select Instances , Actions, Instance State, Start (YES, Confirm) Copy IPv4 Public IP

steps.title: Run software
steps.instruction: Run software: Add: IPv4 Public IP and port 22 your .ppk file (SSH, Auth.) PuTTY 0.70 64-bit Windows 10 run command: ec2-user
